creator: mdg583@gmail.com
text:
Hello Nemysis.

That is no problem if you would like to take maintainership. I tried to do
a follow-up with that old pr, but it didn't seem to be dealt with - hope
that isn't too much of a problem. Anyway, it is probably better for me not
to have to try to maintain a port as I don't use freeBSD regularly at the
time being.

Matthew
